data.title: Imran Khan Seeks Release Due to Health Concerns
data.description: Former Prime Minister of Pakistan, Imran Khan, is advocating for his release from custody, highlighting concerns over his worsening eye condition. Bloomberg posted on X, detailing Khan's appeal for medical attention and his request for freedom based on health grounds. Khan's legal team is actively pursuing his release, emphasizing the urgency of his medical needs. The situation has drawn attention to the conditions of his detention and the impact on his health. Khan's supporters are rallying for his release, underscoring the significance of his health issues in their campaign.

data.title: Crypto Market Rallies Ahead of Lunar New Year Amid Volatility
data.description: The cryptocurrency market is witnessing a rally as the Lunar New Year approaches, driven by an oversold rebound. According to NS3.AI, investors are advised to exercise rational judgment in the face of ongoing volatility. The article emphasizes the importance of caution when considering reducing positions at market highs to manage risk effectively.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | BRICS Plans Precious Metals Exchange to Enhance Trade Autonomy
data.description: BRICS member countries are advancing plans to create a dedicated Precious Metals Exchange within special economic zones. According to NS3.AI, this initiative aims to promote independent pricing and reduce reliance on Western financial systems. The move aligns with the ongoing deployment of a BRICS gold-backed currency pilot, designed to enhance trade autonomy and bypass dollar-centric mechanisms. Officials anticipate the exchange will become operational around 2030, facilitating the trade of metals and rare commodities while fostering fair competition among member states.

data.title: Train Derailment in Southern Switzerland Causes Disruptions
data.description:
A train derailment occurred in southern Switzerland, with no immediate reports of injuries. According to RTHK, Swiss police announced that the incident took place at 7 a.m. local time on Monday when a train derailed near Goppenstein in the canton of Valais. Authorities have not provided further details, but injuries have not been ruled out.

The Swiss Federal Railways operator stated on its website that train services in the Goppenstein area will be affected due to an avalanche. The situation is being monitored, and updates will be provided as more information becomes available.

data.title: CoinShares: Global crypto ETPs saw a net outflow of $3.74 billion over the past month, marking the fourth consecutive week of net outflows.
data.description: A recent report from CoinShares shows that global crypto asset investment products saw an outflow of $173 million last week, bringing the cumulative outflow over the past four weeks to $3.74 billion. James Butterfill, Head of Research at CoinShares, stated that the latest data indicates selling pressure has eased but not yet reversed. The week began with an inflow of $575 million, followed by an outflow of $853 million. On Friday, a $105 million inflow occurred due to lower-than-expected CPI data. Trading activity declined significantly this week, with ETP trading volume falling from a record $63 billion last week to $27 billion. Regionally, US digital asset funds saw an outflow of $403 million, while other regions saw inflows of $230 million. Germany led the way with $115 million in inflows, followed by Canada with $46.3 million and Switzerland with $36.8 million. In terms of specific assets, Bitcoin investment products saw an outflow of $133 million, while products shorting Bitcoin experienced a cumulative outflow of $15.4 million over the past two weeks. Ethereum-related funds saw an outflow of $85.1 million, and smaller products like Hyperliquid saw outflows of $1 million. In contrast, some altcoins recorded inflows: XRP saw an inflow of $33.4 million, Solana $31 million, and Chainlink $1.1 million. Currently, the price of Bitcoin remains below $70,000, and Ether, after two weeks of large-scale outflows, is trading below $2,000. (The Block)

data.title: French Company Capital B Increases Bitcoin Holdings
data.description: French publicly traded company Capital B has announced an increase in its Bitcoin holdings by 6 BTC. According to Odaily, this brings the company's total Bitcoin reserves to 2,834 BTC. Capital B is now ranked 28th among publicly listed companies with Bitcoin treasuries.

data.title: Elon Musk Endorses Solar Power as Future Dominant Energy Source
data.description: Elon Musk has publicly endorsed solar power as the dominant future source of electricity, emphasizing its anticipated growth in the United States. According to NS3.AI, solar capacity is expected to increase significantly in 2026–2027, with a projected 49% rise in operating capacity and plans to surpass coal. This optimism has led to a surge in clean energy stocks, particularly those focused on solar energy, despite economic challenges such as inflation and subsidy reductions.

data.title: Altcoin Market Faces Key Technical Levels Amid Bearish Trends
data.description: The altcoin market is experiencing sensitivity as three significant tokens—Arbitrum (ARB), Injective (INJ), and Bitcoin Cash (BCH)—approach critical technical levels in the third week of February 2026. According to NS3.AI, ARB and INJ are exhibiting bearish trends, with important resistance and support levels that could indicate potential reversals or further declines. Meanwhile, BCH is showing signs of recovery momentum, but it requires sustained bullish follow-through, which may be driven by an upcoming meetup focused on discussing key upgrades.

data.title: Ray Dalio Claims Global Order Has Deteriorated
data.description:
Billionaire investor Ray Dalio has expressed concerns about the current state of global affairs, stating that the world order has broken down. Crypto Rover posted on X, highlighting Dalio's remarks on the geopolitical and economic challenges facing the world today.

Dalio, known for his insights into global markets and economies, pointed to increasing tensions among major powers and the impact of these conflicts on international stability. He emphasized the need for cooperation and dialogue to address these issues and prevent further deterioration.

The investor's comments come amid ongoing economic uncertainties and geopolitical conflicts that have raised concerns about the future of global cooperation and peace. Dalio's perspective adds to the growing discourse on how nations can navigate these challenges in a rapidly changing world.

data.title: European Gas Prices Decline Amid Stable Supply and Tight Storage Conditions
data.description:
European gas prices have experienced a decline as supply remains steady despite tight storage conditions. Wall Street Journal (Markets) posted on X that the current market situation is influenced by consistent supply levels, which have helped alleviate concerns over storage limitations. The steady flow of gas has contributed to a decrease in prices, providing some relief to the market.

The European energy sector has been closely monitoring storage levels, which have been under pressure due to various factors. However, the stable supply has played a crucial role in maintaining market balance. Analysts suggest that the situation could change if supply disruptions occur or if demand increases unexpectedly.

Despite the tight storage conditions, the current supply dynamics have been favorable, leading to a reduction in gas prices. This development is significant for the European energy market, as it helps stabilize prices and ensures a reliable energy supply for consumers.

Market observers continue to watch the situation closely, as any changes in supply or demand could impact prices further. The European energy sector remains vigilant in managing storage levels and ensuring a steady flow of gas to meet consumer needs.

data.title: Gatten Sushi Plans Hong Kong Expansion by 2024
data.description: Japanese conveyor belt sushi brand Gatten Sushi is set to enter the Hong Kong market in September 2024. According to Ming Pao, RDC Group's Managing Director, Toshiyuki Tabata, expressed confidence in the business prospects in Hong Kong, citing the local population's willingness to spend on quality food. The company plans to open outlets in Causeway Bay and Tuen Mun within this year and aims to expand to 10 locations in Hong Kong by 2030.

data.title: Japan's Flu Cases Rise, Schools Suspend Classes Amid Epidemic Alert
data.description: Japan's Ministry of Health, Labour and Welfare reported on February 16 that the average number of flu cases per designated medical institution nationwide reached 43.34 during the week of February 2 to 8. According to Jin10, this marks the fifth consecutive week of increase and the second week at epidemic alert levels. The flu outbreak has led to the suspension of classes in some schools across Japan.

data.title: Data: Russia's daily cryptocurrency trading volume has reached nearly $650 million.
data.description: According to market sources, data from the Russian Ministry of Finance shows that Russians are currently trading cryptocurrency at a daily average of nearly $650 million.

data.title: Anthropic PBC Integrates AI Coding Agent with Major Indian Companies
data.description: Anthropic PBC is integrating its leading AI coding agent into several major Indian corporations. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting this strategic move as part of Anthropic's efforts to expand its AI solutions in the Indian market. The integration aims to enhance the technological capabilities of these firms, leveraging AI to streamline operations and improve efficiency. This development underscores the growing importance of AI in the global business landscape, particularly in rapidly developing economies like India. Anthropic's initiative reflects a broader trend of AI adoption across various industries, as companies seek to harness advanced technologies to maintain competitive advantages.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 69,000 USDT with a Narrowed 2.28% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Feb 16, 2026, 09:37 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 69,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 69,010.726563 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 2.28% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | Gold Trading Resumes After Lunar New Year Break
data.description:
Gold trading in Hong Kong will be suspended from today until Thursday for the Lunar New Year holiday, resuming on Friday. According to RTHK, gold prices in the Year of the Snake saw an increase of over 81%. Ng Wing-han, CEO of King Fook Holdings, noted in an interview that recent gold price fluctuations have led some investors to adopt a wait-and-see approach. However, she emphasized that gold remains an ideal asset due to macroeconomic factors such as the U.S. dollar's performance and geopolitical influences.

Ng also highlighted strong demand for gold products as the Lunar New Year approaches, describing the overall industry growth as healthy. She mentioned that consumer demand for gold related to weddings and personal use is robust. The company plans to develop products that combine craftsmanship with investment value, anticipating stable growth in gold demand in the Year of the Horse.

data.title: India Achieves Significant Milestone in Clean Energy
data.description: India has reached a significant milestone in its clean energy efforts, according to Renewable Energy Minister Pralhad Joshi. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the minister's announcement as a pivotal moment in the country's renewable energy journey. This development underscores India's commitment to expanding its clean energy infrastructure and reducing reliance on fossil fuels. The achievement is part of a broader strategy to enhance sustainable energy production and address environmental concerns. The government continues to focus on increasing the share of renewable sources in the national energy mix, aiming for a more sustainable future.

data.title: OpenEden Reports Suspected DNS Breach on Official Website
data.description: OpenEden, a platform for RWA tokenization, has announced a potential DNS service breach on its official website and portal. According to PANews, the platform has advised users to refrain from interacting with the affected domains to prevent any potential damage to their wallet assets. Despite the breach, all reserve assets remain secure and under control. The team is actively investigating the issue and will provide updates as soon as possible.

data.title: OpenEden's official website and portal DNS servers appear to have been compromised.
data.description: RWA tokenization platform OpenEden issued a statement on the X platform stating that its official website and portal's DNS service was suspected of being compromised. Users are advised to refrain from any interaction with the aforementioned domains to prevent damage to their wallet assets. All reserve assets are currently secure and under control. The team is investigating the matter and will provide updates as soon as possible.
